title: Israel says to occupy swathe of south Lebanon after war
summary_full: Israel's defence minister said the return of hundreds of thousands of displaced Lebanese would be 'completely prevented' until northern Israel's security was ensured
summary_public: Israel's defence minister said the return of hundreds of thousands of displaced Lebanese would be 'completely prevented' until northern Israel's security was ensured
